title: Integrated genomics of PBMAH
author: Jerome BERTHERAT Bruno RAGAZZON
content: S-BSST640 Integrated genomics of PBMAH Primary bilateral macronodular adrenal hyperplasia (PBMAH) are bilateral adrenocortical tumors causing Cushing syndrome. Illegitimate receptors expression dysregulating cortisol is characteristic of PBMAH. The clinical heterogeneity of PBMAH appeared lastly
